pineapples-in-space-4.genetics_lineage: Pineapples in Space #4 is a cross of Pineapple Tart x Space Runtz, bred by Tiki Mad Man and pheno-hunted by Smashby's Trees in Trinidad, Colorado — the #4 phenotype being his standout selection for root vigor, veg structure, and trichome expression. Pig Tail Gardens acquired and verified this cut, noting it as consistently one of the easiest to root and most reliably expressive genetics in their 100+ mother library. Pineapple Tart contributes a pronounced tropical indica backbone with dense, resinous bud structure, while Space Runtz layers in the candy sweetness and slight gassy depth of the Runtz lineage. The #4 pheno was specifically selected for dripping candied pineapple trichomes and structural uniformity across runs.
pineapples-in-space-4.terpene_profile: The dominant terpene axis is myrcene and limonene, producing that ripe tropical fruit punch aroma that defines the strain, backed by caryophyllene adding a subtle spicy warmth on the exhale. Secondary terpenes include linalool and ocimene, which soften the profile into a floral-tropical sweetness reminiscent of fresh pineapple chunks dusted with powdered sugar. As the flower cures, limonene becomes more pronounced while myrcene deepens into a musky mango undertone. In rosin form, the terpene expression intensifies dramatically — live rosin from this cut runs almost candy-juice on the nose with a tropical gas finish.
pineapples-in-space-4.effects: Onset is euphoric and uplifting with a clear cerebral lift that arrives within minutes, making this a daytime-friendly cultivar despite its indica-leaning genetics. The high settles into a warm, functional body relaxation without couch-lock, with a mood elevation that sustains well for 2-3 hours. Creativity and sociability are hallmarks of this pheno — it's conversational and energetic enough for afternoon sessions while still delivering satisfying physical comfort. PTG describes the stone as a 'hard hammer' — the #4 pheno barely beat out its siblings in Smashby's selection precisely for the combination of trichome expression and effect intensity. THC expression on the #4 is potent, typically landing in the upper 20s percent range.
pineapples-in-space-4.flavor_aroma: On the nose, fresh-cut pineapple dominates with a sugary candy sweetness that leans more Runtz than traditional tropical — it's confectionery and bright rather than earthy. Inhale delivers a smooth, almost creamy pineapple-citrus that coats the palate, while the exhale brings a faint gas kick that grounds the sweetness. During late flower the whole room fills with a juicy tropical punch aroma that intensifies at harvest. After a proper 4-6 week cure, the candy notes deepen and a subtle floral quality emerges that makes it exceptional for both smoke and press.
pineapples-in-space-4.grow_notes: Pineapples in Space #4 is what PTG calls a 'freak of nature in all stages' — a true unicorn grow that excels from clone to harvest. It roots faster than its siblings, moves through veg more uniformly, and carries that explosive energy all the way to a dense, trichome-loaded finish. Moderate stretch (roughly 2x), strong central cola, good lateral branching that responds well to topping and LST. Smashby's Trees confirmed this pheno as the standout from the pack hunt: consistently the best to root, best through veg, and dripping in candied pineapple trichomes with flavonoids that express clearly in the smoke. Flowering time runs 8-9 weeks with a wide harvest window — trichomes cloud up early but the candy terps peak around day 60-63. Prefers moderate humidity (50-55% RH in flower), VPD around 1.2-1.4 kPa in mid-flower, and runs clean in both soil and coco.
pineapples-in-space-4.rosin_extraction: This cultivar is an excellent solventless candidate — the dense trichome coverage Smashby's Trees selected for translates directly to wash efficiency, typically yielding 3-5% as fresh frozen IWHE with quality 73-90 micron heads. Press at 160-170°F for 90-120 seconds on fresh frozen material for a terpy, stable badder or jam consistency; live rosin runs a vibrant golden-amber with exceptional tropical candy aroma. Wash water should be kept at 34-38°F to preserve terpene heads and minimize fats. The rosin from this cut is known for holding its pineapple-candy nose all the way through the press.

rainbow-runtz.genetics_lineage: Rainbow Runtz is a verified cut sourced by Pig Tail Gardens, the result of a collaboration between the Runtz Crew and Laughing Gas — two of the most recognized names in West Coast candy genetics. The actual genetic cross is Zkittlez × White Runtz: the original Zkittlez (3 in the Morning x Grape Ape) provides the dense, trichome-heavy structure and tropical candy depth, while White Runtz (Zkittlez × Gelato) layers in the refined candy-cream sweetness and the dense purple bud expression that made the Runtz line legendary. 'Laughing Gas × Runtz Crew' in the PTG listing refers to the producer collaboration, not the strain cross. Pig Tail Gardens describes this as one of the sweetest candy cuts in their entire library — a cup-winning variety noted for beautiful dense purple buds with improved bag appeal and yield over both the traditional Zkittlez and Runtz parent cuts.
rainbow-runtz.terpene_profile: Limonene and caryophyllene lead the terpene profile, creating a sharp candy-citrus nose with a spicy, diesel-tinged backend that's classic Runtz lineage. Secondary terpenes include myrcene and linalool, which add fruit depth and a subtle floral sweetness that rounds out the sharpness. The Laughing Gas influence shows up as a bright top note — almost fizzy candy or grape soda on the nose — that separates this from standard Runtz cuts. Terpene expression builds through cure: at week 2 it's candy-forward, by week 6 a deeper grape-gas complexity emerges that's exceptional in concentrate form.
rainbow-runtz.effects: Rainbow Runtz delivers a fast-acting, intensely euphoric onset that lands hard behind the eyes with a mood-lifting, pressure-releasing wave. The high is well-balanced — strong enough for experienced consumers to feel potent, cerebral and social without anxiety, and body relaxation that deepens gradually over the first hour. It's a versatile time-of-day strain, suitable for late afternoon into evening use, with a duration of 2-3 hours before softening into a comfortable, sleepy conclusion. Consistent THC in the high 20s drives the potency.
rainbow-runtz.flavor_aroma: The aroma hits you immediately on jar opening — grape candy, sweet gas, and a fruity citrus zing that's unmistakably Runtz. Inhale is smooth and sweet, with candy-fruit coating the palate on the draw; exhale brings the gas and a slight berry tartness. Late flower aroma is pungent and room-filling — dark fruit and confectionery with a fuel backbone. Cured properly for 4-6 weeks, the smoke develops a creamy, almost gelato-like richness that lingers on the palate long after exhale.
rainbow-runtz.grow_notes: Rainbow Runtz exhibits the classic Runtz Crew structure — compact-to-medium height with dense, tightly packed nodes and heavy purple expression under cooler late-flower temperatures (60-65°F nights in weeks 6-8 will maximize the anthocyanin expression). It responds well to topping early and benefits from a ScrOG or heavy LST to open the canopy and maximize light penetration given its dense structure. Flowering time is 8-9 weeks, with trichome maturation signaled by a color shift from clear to mostly cloudy with 10-20% amber for peak harvest. VPD management is critical due to bud density — keep below 1.3 kPa in late flower to prevent moisture-related issues.
rainbow-runtz.rosin_extraction: Rainbow Runtz is a premium solventless cultivar — the dense resin glands and candy-gas terpene profile translate beautifully into ice water hash and rosin. Fresh frozen IWHE yields typically run 3-5% with full-melt heads washing well at 73-90 microns in 34-37°F water. Press fresh frozen material at 155-165°F for a stable, candy-terp live rosin that expresses as a bright amber-gold with the full grape-candy nose intact. Hash rosin from cured material presses cleanly at 175-180°F and makes an excellent budder or cold-cure product. The purple pigment in the flowers does not affect rosin quality.

jam-pack-2.genetics_lineage: Jam Pack #2 is an original Pig Tail Gardens breed, the result of years of in-house pheno hunting and selection within PTG's Hollywood facility — a cultivar born from their deep genetics library and refined specifically for solventless hash performance. PTG developed this line with the hash maker in mind, selecting the #2 phenotype for its extraordinary resin output, which consistently pushes 7% returns in fresh frozen ice water hash extraction — a figure that places it among the elite performers in any solventless library. The exact cross is PTG's proprietary selection, reflecting the same rigorous breeding philosophy they apply to all their genetics: grow large populations, test everything for smoke, structure, and extraction yield, and only release what truly stands apart. Jam Pack #2 represents the culmination of that process.
jam-pack-2.terpene_profile: Jam Pack #2 leans into a rich, layered terpene profile that skews toward fruit-forward complexity with a gas and cream undertone — reflecting PTG's preference for high-impact, hash-expressive aromatics. Myrcene and caryophyllene form the base, lending a dank, musky sweetness with spice, while limonene adds the jammy fruit brightness that gives the strain its name. Secondary terpenes include linalool and bisabolol, which contribute a floral creaminess that becomes more apparent after cure and especially in the live rosin. At harvest the aroma is intensely sweet-gassy; in concentrate form it opens up into a complex jam-and-cream nose that's immediately distinctive.
jam-pack-2.effects: The high from Jam Pack #2 is heavy-handed and indica-leaning, with a creeping onset that builds from a euphoric mood shift into a deep, full-body relaxation within 20-30 minutes. PTG's selection criteria emphasized effect quality alongside yield — this is a cultivar that stacks both, delivering potent THC levels paired with a terpene-synergy that makes the high feel complete and well-rounded rather than one-dimensional. Best suited for evening use, stress relief, and pain management, with a duration of 2-3 hours before easing into sedation. As a hash the effects concentrate further — small amounts of live rosin go a long way.
jam-pack-2.flavor_aroma: Jam Pack #2 smells exactly like its name — ripe summer berry jam with a gassy, dank backbone that keeps it from being purely sweet. On inhale the flavor is rich and complex: berry-fruit up front with cream and a slight earthiness mid-palate, finishing with a clean gas note on exhale. Late in flower the whole grow room takes on a sweet-pungent jam-fruit aroma that's unmistakable and pungent. Cured for 6+ weeks, the smoke develops a jammy richness that translates directly into exceptional live rosin — one of PTG's most flavorful extracts in the library.
jam-pack-2.grow_notes: As a PTG original, Jam Pack #2 was selected in part for its structure and manageability — it runs a moderate height with strong lateral branching and an excellent calyx-to-leaf ratio that makes trimming efficient and resin density high. PTG notes it pushes through veg evenly and finishes in 8-9 weeks of flower with dense, resin-coated buds that stack weight and terps simultaneously. Training with topping and LST maximizes site count; it's well-suited to ScrOG in a controlled indoor environment. Environmental preferences align with most premium cookie-family genetics: 75-80°F daytime, 65-70°F nights, VPD 1.2-1.5 kPa through peak flower.
jam-pack-2.rosin_extraction: The defining characteristic of Jam Pack #2 is its rosin performance — PTG specifically selected this phenotype for its consistent 7% fresh frozen IWHE yield, which puts it in elite company among solventless-focused cultivars. Wash at 34-36°F in 73-90 micron bags for full-melt quality hash heads; the large, intact trichome glands wash cleanly with minimal agitation needed. Press fresh frozen at 155-165°F for 90 seconds to achieve a terpy, stable live rosin that runs amber-gold and holds the jam-fruit aroma in full. Cold cure at 45-50°F for 5-7 days post-press for a premium budder consistency. This is the crown jewel of PTG's hash-forward breeding work.

kryptochronic.genetics_lineage: Kryptochronic is a celebrated exotic bred by Compound Genetics — a highly respected California breeding operation known for working closely with elite growers including Alien Labs, who cultivates and distributes this cultivar under their brand. The cross is (Fruity Pebbles OG × Alien Cookies) × Jet Fuel Gelato: Compound Genetics first combined FPOG and Alien Cookies to build a fruit-gas-cookie foundation, then added Jet Fuel Gelato to layer in fuel and cream. Alien Cookies contributes dense, resinous structure and exotic cookie-gas depth, Fruity Pebbles OG adds rainbow candy sweetness and cerebral energy, while Jet Fuel Gelato ties it together with its signature fuel and cream. The result is a genetics triple-threat that gained widespread recognition for its distinctly alien terpene profile — a cultivar Alien Labs has championed as a cornerstone of their lineup.
kryptochronic.terpene_profile: Kryptochronic expresses a highly complex terpene profile dominated by limonene, caryophyllene, and myrcene, with notable contributions from terpinolene that give it an almost piney, floral brightness on top of the candy-gas base. The Fruity Pebbles OG parentage comes through clearly as a rainbow candy sweetness, while the Jet Fuel Gelato adds a sharp fuel note that cuts through the fruit like a knife. Secondary terpenes include ocimene and linalool, creating a multi-dimensional aroma that shifts from sweet to gassy to floral depending on grow environment and cure time. In concentrate form, the terpene expression is complex and almost overwhelming — a true example of Alien Labs' philosophy of maximizing aromatic depth.
kryptochronic.effects: Kryptochronic hits with a fast, clear-headed cerebral euphoria characteristic of its Fruity Pebbles OG heritage — uplifting, focused, and creative in onset, before the Alien Cookies genetics gradually pull the experience toward a warm, resin-heavy body relaxation. The balance between sativa energy and indica depth makes this a versatile, all-day cultivar for experienced consumers who can manage high-THC genetics, typically expressing in the upper 20s to low 30s percent. The mood elevation is notably clean and non-anxious, with a duration of 2-3 hours before softening. Best used for creative work, social settings, or as an evening wind-down depending on individual tolerance.
kryptochronic.flavor_aroma: The aroma of Kryptochronic is immediately striking — rainbow candy and Fruity Pebbles cereal mixed with sharp gasoline and a creamy gelato finish that makes it smell almost edible. On inhale the flavor delivers on the promise: sweet fruit and candy up front transitioning to fuel and cookie on the exhale, with a lingering creaminess that coats the palate. Late flower aroma is complex and room-filling, shifting from sweet to gassy depending on the time of day and temperature. A long cure of 6-8 weeks brings out the full gelato-fuel complexity that makes this cultivar so sought after.
kryptochronic.grow_notes: Kryptochronic is a moderately challenging cultivar that benefits from experienced hands — it has a pronounced stretch in early flower (1.5-2x), responds well to aggressive topping and mainlining, and needs dialed environmental control to prevent the dense bud structure from trapping moisture. Flowering time runs 9-10 weeks with resin maturation peaking around day 63-67; the trichomes stack densely but require patience for full amber development. Alien Labs genetics generally prefer well-amended living soil or precision-dialed coco, moderate EC feeding, and slightly lower humidity in late flower (45-50% RH) to protect bud integrity. VPD of 1.3-1.6 kPa through peak flower will maximize terpene and resin production.
kryptochronic.rosin_extraction: Kryptochronic is a strong solventless performer, with the dense Alien Cookies-derived resin glands washing well in ice water at 34-37°F across 73-120 micron bags for a range of hash grades. Fresh frozen IWHE yields typically run 3-5%, with the 90-micron return showing the best balance of yield and melt quality. Press fresh frozen at 160-170°F for a stable, terpy live rosin that runs golden-amber with the full candy-gas nose preserved; too high a temperature risks burning off the delicate limonene and terpinolene fraction. The rosin from Kryptochronic is exceptional — complex, multi-layered, and distinctive enough that it stands out in any hash menu.

cherry-jealousy.genetics_lineage: Cherry Jealousy is an original Pig Tail Gardens creation, a deliberate cross pairing a cherry-forward cultivar with Jealousy — Seed Junky Genetics' acclaimed Sherbet Bx1 x Gelato 41 — to marry the deep cherry-fruit aromatics PTG was chasing with the dense, resinous structure and creamy dessert complexity that Jealousy delivers. PTG's philosophy of extensive pheno hunting drives every original release, and Cherry Jealousy is no exception — this represents the winning selection from a large population grown specifically to identify the ideal cherry-gas expression on a Jealousy backbone. Sherbet Bx1 (a Sherbert backcross carrying Animal Cookies depth) and Gelato 41 (Sunset Sherbet x Thin Mint Cookies) give Jealousy its legendary creamy, dessert-forward base, while the cherry parent amplifies the fruit dimension with dark cherry and red berry top notes. The result is one of PTG's most aromatic original cultivars.
cherry-jealousy.terpene_profile: Cherry Jealousy is dominated by caryophyllene and limonene, expressing a bold cherry-gas aroma with a creamy dessert sweetness underneath that traces directly to the Sherbet and Gelato parentage. Secondary terpenes include myrcene, linalool, and ocimene, which round out the cherry-fruit brightness with floral sweetness and a subtle herbal complexity on the backend. The cherry expression is pronounced and natural — dark Bing cherry rather than artificial or candy-like — with a gas and cream finish that's unmistakably PTG's taste profile. In live rosin, the cherry-gas complexity concentrates beautifully, making this one of the most aromatic extracts in PTG's original breed lineup.
cherry-jealousy.effects: The effects of Cherry Jealousy reflect the Jealousy backbone — a potent, indica-leaning high that arrives with a strong euphoric mood shift before settling into a deep, comfortable body relaxation that's both calming and uplifting. PTG's cherry parent selection adds a layer of cerebral brightness to the onset that keeps it from feeling too heavy too early, making it suitable for late-afternoon or evening use rather than strictly sedative. Potency is high — consistent upper 20s THC — with a duration of 2-3 hours before the relaxation deepens into sleepiness. Ideal for stress relief, creative unwinding, and evening sessions.
cherry-jealousy.flavor_aroma: The aroma is unmistakably cherry — dark, ripe, almost jammy red-black cherry with a gas and cream foundation that makes it smell like a cherry dessert filled with diesel. On inhale the cherry flavor is rich and real, transitioning mid-palate to the creamy Gelato-Sherbet depth, and finishing with a clean gas exhale that lingers. At harvest the flowers smell intensely of cherry candy-gas; after a 4-6 week cure the cherry note deepens and sweetens while the gas sharpens. The smoke is smooth and flavorful — one of PTG's most aromatic original cultivars and a standout in any collection.
cherry-jealousy.grow_notes: Cherry Jealousy inherits the dense, compact structure typical of Jealousy genetics — moderate height, tight internodal spacing, and heavy resin-coated buds that pack weight and terps simultaneously. PTG's selection prioritized both aromatic expression and structural performance, resulting in a phenotype that is as grow-friendly as it is visually striking. Topping twice early followed by LST opens the canopy well; it also performs excellently in ScrOG format. Flowering time runs 8-9 weeks with the cherry aromas peaking in the final two weeks; cooler night temperatures (62-65°F) in the last two weeks enhance the red-purple pigmentation that mirrors the cherry terpene profile. VPD 1.2-1.4 kPa through mid-flower, dropping humidity to 45% in the final stretch.
cherry-jealousy.rosin_extraction: Cherry Jealousy excels in solventless extraction — the dense Jealousy-derived trichome structure produces large, intact heads that wash efficiently in 34-37°F water across 73-90 micron bags. Fresh frozen IWHE yields run 4-6% from quality material, with the 73-micron return often showing exceptional melt quality. Press at 155-165°F for 90 seconds on fresh frozen for a cherry-gas live rosin that runs deep amber and smells exactly like the flower — an intensely aromatic extract that conveys the full cherry-dessert profile in every dab. Cold cure for 5-7 days post-press at 45-50°F for a soft budder that holds its terpene complexity well during storage.

lipsmackerz.genetics_lineage: Lipsmackerz is an indica-dominant hybrid originally bred by Good Greens and brought to market by Maven Genetics — a premium California cannabis brand with over twenty years of cultivating award-winning strains. The cross is CLTVTF × Good Genes, a pairing designed to maximize dessert-candy complexity and heavy resin production. CLTVTF contributes the structural foundation and resin density, while Good Genes delivers the sweet, candy-forward terpene expression that defines the strain's profile. Pig Tail Gardens carries a verified cut of Lipsmackerz. The result is exactly what the name promises — a strain that demands your attention on every jar opening.
lipsmackerz.terpene_profile: Limonene leads decisively, expressing as bright citrus-candy that immediately evokes lemon drops and fruit chews, followed by caryophyllene providing a spicy, gassy backbone that keeps the profile from being one-dimensionally sweet. Myrcene adds a musky, fruit-depth undertone while linalool contributes a soft floral sweetness that rounds out the candy expression into something more nuanced and complex. The Z Animal Cookies lineage introduces subtle gas notes that become more prominent after cure, adding a fuel dimension that transforms the aroma from purely candy into candy-gas complexity. In rosin form, the limonene-dominant terpene pack expresses brilliantly — bright, citrusy, and intensely sweet on the nose.
lipsmackerz.effects: Lipsmackerz delivers a euphoric, mood-lifting onset that reflects its LCG heritage — uplifting and cerebral at first, transitioning over 30-45 minutes into a comfortable, indica-leaning body relaxation that doesn't completely couch-lock. The candy terpene profile synergizes with the THC (typically high 20s) to create an effect that feels rich, complete, and indulgent — much like the flavor experience. Evening and late-afternoon use is ideal; it's social and functional in moderate doses but sedative in larger amounts. Excellent for appetite stimulation, stress relief, and creative unwinding.
lipsmackerz.flavor_aroma: The aroma is candy-store quality — lemon drops, fruit chews, and sweet dough with an underlying gas that sharpens the overall profile. Inhale brings a smooth, candy-sweet citrus flavor that coats the palate entirely; exhale delivers a spicy-gas finish with a sweet aftertaste that lingers pleasantly. At harvest the flowers smell intensely of lemon candy and sweet gas; a 4-6 week cure deepens the citrus-candy complexity and brings out the Animal Cookies earthiness underneath. The smoke is exceptionally flavorful — each bowl delivers the full candy experience front to back.
lipsmackerz.grow_notes: Lipsmackerz grows with a moderate height and good structural density typical of its Animal Cookies lineage — compact nodes, strong lateral branching, and tight bud formation that stacks weight well with proper support. It responds well to topping and LST, with a relatively forgiving growth structure that suits both intermediate and experienced cultivators. Flowering time runs 8-9 weeks; the candy aromas begin expressing strongly around week 5-6 and continue building to harvest. Prefers slightly lower feeding EC than pure cookie lines — avoid over-feeding nitrogen in flower to protect terpene expression. Temperature management matters: keeping nights at 65-68°F in late flower enhances the purple-pink color expression some phenotypes carry.
lipsmackerz.rosin_extraction: Lipsmackerz performs well as a solventless cultivar — the LCG and Z Animal Cookies heritage produces abundant, well-developed trichome heads that wash efficiently in ice water at 34-37°F with 73-90 micron screens. Fresh frozen IWHE yields land in the 3-5% range from quality material, with the 90-micron bag often showing the most intact heads and cleanest melt. Press at 160-170°F for a bright, candy-forward live rosin with exceptional citrus-candy terpene expression — the limonene-dominant profile holds well through the press. The resulting rosin is pale amber to gold, terpy, and aromatic; cold cure at 45°F for 5 days delivers a premium badder that holds the full Lipsmackerz candy nose.

limecicle.genetics_lineage: Limecicle is a verified cut sourced by Pig Tail Gardens from Duke of Erb, a breeder well-known for working with Zkittlez-derived genetics to produce tropical, high-terpene cultivars with exceptional flavor and rosin-ready resin profiles. The cross is Zkittlez x Strawberry Zkillato — a deliberate pairing that stacks the original Zkittlez candy-fruit complexity against Strawberry Zkillato (itself a Zkittlez derivative with strawberry-forward terpene expression), creating a double-Zkittlez depth of tropical citrus sweetness with a lime-citrus top note that's unmistakable. Duke of Erb's approach prioritizes terpene intensity and wash quality, and Limecicle reflects that — PTG added this cut specifically for its aromatic intensity and strong hash performance. The result is a cultivar that sits at the apex of citrus-candy genetic expression.
limecicle.terpene_profile: Limecicle is defined by an exceptional limonene-forward terpene profile layered over a Zkittlez candy-fruit base — bright, zesty lime and citrus peel dominate, with secondary notes of strawberry candy and tropical sweetness that emerge from the Strawberry Zkillato parent. Caryophyllene and myrcene provide the structural depth underneath the fruit brightness, adding spice and a musky earthiness that grounds the aroma. Ocimene contributes a sweet, herbal lift that makes the overall profile smell almost effervescent — like sparkling lime soda with fruit candy and a hint of earth. In rosin, the limonene fraction is exceptionally vibrant, producing a bright citrus-lime aroma that's among the most expressive in the Zkittlez family.
limecicle.effects: Limecicle delivers a bright, uplifting, and energizing effect profile that mirrors its sativa-influenced terpene expression — onset is euphoric and mood-lifting with a clear-headed creative quality that favors daytime or early afternoon use. As the high settles, a gentle body relaxation from the Zkittlez indica genetics gradually fills in without dulling the cerebral brightness, creating a well-balanced effect that's functional and enjoyable. THC runs in the low-to-mid 20s with a terpene-forward entourage effect that makes the experience feel more nuanced and rounded than the numbers alone suggest. Duration is 1.5-2.5 hours, making it appropriate for multiple sessions through the day.
limecicle.flavor_aroma: The aroma is lime and tropical citrus candy — fresh-squeezed lime juice, orange zest, and a strawberry candy undertone that together create a distinctly refreshing, fruit-forward fragrance. Inhale delivers a clean, bright lime-citrus flavor that's almost cooling on the palate; exhale brings a fruity sweetness with a mild earthy finish. At harvest the flowers smell intensely of fresh lime and citrus peel; a proper 4-6 week cure deepens the strawberry candy undertone and mellows the zest into a richer tropical citrus complexity. PTG notes this cut is among the most aromatic in their lime-citrus category.
limecicle.grow_notes: Limecicle inherits the Zkittlez growth structure — compact to medium height, strong branching, and good node density that produces well-packed, trichome-covered buds with minimal need for heavy defoliation. It prefers moderate environmental conditions: 75-78°F daytime, 64-68°F nights, with VPD around 1.0-1.3 kPa through mid-flower to manage the dense bud structure. Flowering time runs 8-9 weeks with the lime terpenes peaking strongly in the final two weeks before harvest. Cooler late-flower temperatures enhance the green-yellow phenotype's color and push the lime note higher in the aroma profile. Responds well to topping and light LST; heavy training is not required given its naturally branchy structure.
limecicle.rosin_extraction: Limecicle is an excellent solventless cultivar — Duke of Erb's Zkittlez-heavy genetics produce abundant trichome heads that wash efficiently and cleanly in ice water at 33-37°F across 73-90 micron bags. Fresh frozen IWHE yields run 3-5%, with the 73-micron return often showing the most aromatic and highest-quality heads. Press at 155-165°F on fresh frozen material for a bright, citrus-lime live rosin that runs pale gold and expresses the full lime-candy nose in concentrated form. Lower press temperatures preserve the volatile limonene fractions that define this cultivar's aroma. PTG acquired this cut specifically for its hash performance — expect clean, vibrant, and highly flavorful output.

papayamosa.genetics_lineage: Papayamosa is a verified clone sourced by Pig Tail Gardens from Duke of Erb, crossing Lemon Cherry Gelato (LCG) with Blueberry Mimosa to create a tropical, citrus-heavy cultivar with outstanding rosin yield and flavor. PTG notes this cut consistently pushes 6%+ in fresh frozen ice water hash extraction — a performance benchmark that reflects the quality of the trichome heads and the resin density of the LCG heritage. Lemon Cherry Gelato contributes bright citrus and cherry sweetness alongside heavy resin production, while Blueberry Mimosa adds the tropical papaya-citrus profile and the easy wash characteristic of Mimosa-family genetics. Duke of Erb developed this cross specifically for tropical terpene expression and hash performance, and PTG's verification process confirmed it delivers on both fronts.
papayamosa.terpene_profile: Papayamosa expresses a tropical terpene profile centered on limonene and myrcene, producing a papaya-citrus aroma that's juicy and ripe with a light floral sweetness underneath. The Blueberry Mimosa parent brings a citrusy mimosa fizz to the top notes, while LCG grounds it with a lemon-cherry creaminess that deepens the overall profile. Secondary terpenes include caryophyllene, ocimene, and linalool — the ocimene contributing a sweet herbal brightness, the linalool adding soft floral notes, and the caryophyllene providing a subtle spice on the exhale. In concentrate form this terpene profile concentrates into an intensely tropical, almost juice-like aroma that's exceptionally expressive and vibrant.
papayamosa.effects: Papayamosa provides a well-balanced, uplifting high anchored by the LCG genetics — onset is euphoric and mood-elevating with a clear-headed brightness that transitions gradually into a comfortable body relaxation without sedation. The tropical terpene profile contributes to a light, energetic quality in the high that makes it appropriate for daytime or early evening use, with a functional, social character that pairs well with outdoor activities or creative work. THC is typically in the mid-to-high 20s; duration runs 2-2.5 hours with a soft landing. PTG customers consistently note this as a strain that delivers a clean, flavorful experience both smoked and pressed.
papayamosa.flavor_aroma: PTG categorizes Papayamosa's flavor genre as Sweet/Gas — a clean two-word summary of a tropical-forward profile with a gas undercurrent that keeps it interesting past the first sniff. The aroma is tropical fruit: ripe papaya, citrus zest, and a light berry sweetness from the Blueberry Mimosa parent that makes it smell like a freshly poured tropical smoothie. On inhale the flavor is bright and juicy: papaya-citrus with a lemon-cherry cream finish that lingers pleasantly. Exhale delivers a soft, clean tropical sweetness with a barely perceptible gas note. In late flower the aroma is room-filling and intensely tropical — harvest the moment trichomes are ready to capture the full terpene peak. A 4-6 week cure settles the aroma into a richer, more complex tropical expression that shows beautifully in fresh rosin.
papayamosa.grow_notes: Papayamosa grows with moderate height and good vigor from the LCG heritage — strong lateral branching, good node density, and a resin development timeline that's consistent and reliable. It responds well to topping once and light LST to open the canopy; the Mimosa genetics contribute a slightly more open structure than pure LCG, which helps airflow through the canopy. PTG lists this cut with a Purple/Neapolitan color profile — the purple expression develops under cooler late-flower temperatures and adds visual appeal without affecting terpene quality. Flowering time runs 8-9 weeks with resin peaking around day 58-63; trichomes stack densely in the final two weeks and the tropical aroma intensifies dramatically at harvest. Prefers moderate feeding, well-managed VPD (1.2-1.4 kPa in mid-flower), and slightly lower late-flower humidity (48-52% RH) to maximize resin quality.
papayamosa.rosin_extraction: Papayamosa is among the strongest hash performers in PTG's library, with PTG noting consistent 6%+ fresh frozen IWHE returns that reflect the exceptional trichome head quality from the LCG-Mimosa cross. Wash at 33-36°F in 73-90 micron bags for peak yield and quality; the trichome heads are large and wash cleanly with minimal agitation. Press fresh frozen at 155-165°F for 60-90 seconds to achieve a vibrant, tropical live rosin that runs golden-amber and expresses the full papaya-citrus nose. Lower press temperatures preserve the limonene and myrcene fractions that define the aroma. This is a top-tier solventless cultivar — PTG acquired it specifically because it delivers on both yield and flavor.

nana-glue.genetics_lineage: Nana Glue is a strategic indica-dominant hybrid from Square One Genetics (sister company to Robin Hood Seeds, led by Michigan-based breeder THC Titan), crossing the legendary Gorilla Glue #4 with Banana Butter Cups — a pairing designed to temper GG4's aggressive diesel-fuel character with banana sweetness while maintaining the extraordinary resin production that made GG4 one of the most influential genetics in modern cannabis. Pig Tail Gardens carries the specific Monroe's Bedhead cut — a verified selection recognized for exceptional resin density and terpene expression within the Nana Glue line. Gorilla Glue #4, developed accidentally by GG Strains from a hermaphroditic Chem's Sister x Sour Dubb x Chocolate Diesel cross, contributes unparalleled resin yield and a powerful, glue-like diesel-earthy terpene base. Banana Butter Cups adds a sweet, ripe banana and cream top note that lifts and softens the profile into something more complex and approachable. The result is a heavy-yielding, resin-stacked cultivar that bridges the gap between classic GG4 diesel power and modern dessert-candy genetics.
nana-glue.terpene_profile: Nana Glue's terpene profile is led by myrcene and caryophyllene — the myrcene driving a ripe, tropical banana-mango depth and the caryophyllene adding the spice and diesel complexity inherited from GG4. Secondary terpenes include limonene and linalool, which add a citrus brightness and floral softness that keep the heavy diesel-banana base from becoming overwhelming. The banana expression is natural and ripe rather than artificial — think overripe plantain and banana bread rather than banana candy. After cure, the terpene profile deepens as the diesel notes from GG4 assert themselves more clearly beneath the fruit sweetness, creating a layered, complex aroma that rewards patience.
nana-glue.effects: Nana Glue delivers the heavy, couchlock-adjacent body effect GG4 is famous for, modulated by the Banana Butter Cups genetics into something slightly more cerebral and euphoric at onset. The high begins with a mood-lifting, stress-melting wave before settling into a deep, full-body relaxation that is best suited for evening use, rest days, or pain and anxiety management. THC expression is typically high — mid to upper 20s — with a long duration of 3-4 hours and a gradual, comfortable come-down. As a concentrate the effects intensify considerably; even small amounts of Nana Glue rosin or hash deliver a powerfully sedating, deeply physical experience.
nana-glue.flavor_aroma: The aroma is ripe banana and diesel — GG4's signature earthy fuel backbone wrapped in a sweet banana-cream top note that makes it simultaneously familiar and exotic. On inhale the flavor leads with banana sweetness; mid-palate the diesel and earth from GG4 take over; exhale delivers the full fuel-fruit complexity with a lingering banana creaminess. At harvest the flowers smell powerfully of diesel-banana — pungent, room-filling, and immediately identifiable. After 4-6 weeks of cure the banana expression deepens into a richer, more complex tropical-diesel profile that translates beautifully into rosin.
nana-glue.grow_notes: Nana Glue inherits GG4's prolific resin production and its tendency toward medium-tall height with good lateral branching — it appreciates topping and LST to manage height and maximize sites, and benefits from a solid trellis system to support the heavy, resin-laden colas in late flower. Flowering time runs 8-9 weeks with trichomes stacking densely from week 5 onward; GG4 genetics typically show early resin maturation but benefit from patience to reach full amber development. The plant is resilient and forgiving — a good performer in both soil and coco with moderate-to-heavy feeding in mid-flower. VPD management matters: keep around 1.2-1.4 kPa in peak flower and drop humidity to 45-50% in the final stretch to protect the dense buds.
nana-glue.rosin_extraction: Nana Glue is a solventless powerhouse — GG4's legendary resin production combined with Banana Butter Cups' trichome quality creates a wash profile that is both high-yielding and high-quality. Fresh frozen IWHE yields typically run 4-6% from quality material, with 73-90 micron bags returning excellent full-melt heads. Wash at 34-37°F in multiple short agitation passes to maximize yield without degrading head quality. Press at 165-175°F for a stable, banana-diesel live rosin that runs deep amber and holds the full banana-fuel nose after pressing. Cold cure for 5-7 days at 45-50°F creates a soft, terpy budder that stacks beautifully for dabs. One of the most reliable yield performers in any solventless library.

cream-smoothie.genetics_lineage: Cream Smoothie is a craft hybrid from Fiya Farmer, crossing Gelonade with C.R.E.A.M. (Cookies and Cream-derived genetics) to produce a dessert-forward cultivar with a citrus-cream terpene profile and outstanding rosin character. Pig Tail Gardens carries this as a verified cut, noting that the flavors and aromas translate perfectly from flower to smoke to concentrate — a testament to the terpene integrity that PTG looks for in their library acquisitions. Gelonade (Gelato x Lemon Tree) contributes the bright citrus-lemon energy and creamy gelato depth, while C.R.E.A.M. adds a cookies-and-cream richness and the dense, compact bud structure associated with cookies-family genetics. Fiya Farmer's breeding is focused on high-impact flavor and visual appeal, and Cream Smoothie achieves both — the lavender and deep green hues alongside dense white trichomes make it as beautiful to look at as it is to consume.
cream-smoothie.terpene_profile: Cream Smoothie is defined by a limonene, caryophyllene, and linalool terpene axis — limonene driving bright citrus-lemon top notes, caryophyllene providing a spicy-cream depth, and linalool contributing the soft floral sweetness that gives the strain its smoothie-like softness. Myrcene and humulene round out the base, adding earthy fruit depth and a subtle herbal quality that grounds the otherwise bright, creamy profile. The terpene expression is notably clean and smooth — no harsh or aggressive notes — which mirrors the strain name and explains PTG's endorsement. In live rosin, the limonene-linalool combination creates an almost lavender-citrus cream aroma that is distinctive and memorable.
cream-smoothie.effects: Cream Smoothie provides a well-balanced, euphoric high with a clean onset that's uplifting and mood-stabilizing before settling into a gentle, comfortable body relaxation. The linalool terpenes contribute a notably calming quality to the high, making this a good choice for stress relief and anxiety management without the sedation of heavier indica genetics. THC typically runs 20-25% with a smooth, approachable effect profile that's appropriate for a wide range of experience levels in moderate doses. Evening and late-afternoon use is ideal; duration runs 2-2.5 hours with a clean, comfortable wind-down. PTG customers note this strain pairs exceptionally well with food and creative activities.
cream-smoothie.flavor_aroma: The aroma is exactly what the name promises — a smooth, creamy citrus blend reminiscent of a lemon-vanilla smoothie with a subtle floral lift from the linalool. On inhale the flavor is soft and creamy: lemon-citrus up front with a vanilla-cream mid-palate that coats the throat gently. Exhale delivers a mild spice from caryophyllene with a lingering citrus-cream sweetness. At harvest the flowers smell of tropical fruit and cream with a lemon brightness; after 4-6 weeks of cure the lavender-floral dimension from linalool becomes more pronounced, adding complexity to the citrus-cream base. PTG specifically noted the flavors translate perfectly into smoke and rosin — confirmed by their customer response.
cream-smoothie.grow_notes: Cream Smoothie runs a medium stature with a compact, cookies-influenced structure — tight nodes, strong branching, and dense bud sites that stack weight and resin consistently across runs. It finishes in roughly 8-9 weeks (56-65 days), a reliable timeline that makes scheduling harvest straightforward. Responds well to topping once or twice early and light defoliation in mid-flower to improve light penetration; not a particularly stretchy plant. Prefers moderate environmental conditions — 76-80°F daytime, 65-68°F nights, and VPD around 1.2-1.4 kPa in mid-flower. The lavender and green hues intensify with slightly cooler late-flower temperatures, making a diurnal swing of 10-12°F beneficial in the final two weeks.
cream-smoothie.rosin_extraction: Cream Smoothie is an excellent solventless performer — PTG's endorsement of its flavor translation to rosin is backed by the dense trichome coverage and intact head structure that the Gelonade x C.R.E.A.M. genetics produce. Fresh frozen IWHE yields run 3-5% from quality material across 73-90 micron bags, with the 90-micron return often showing excellent melt and full aromatic expression. Press at 155-165°F for 90 seconds to achieve a pale golden live rosin with a pronounced lemon-cream nose; slightly lower temperatures preserve the volatile limonene and linalool fractions that define the aroma. Cold cure for 5-7 days at 45°F produces a soft, aromatic budder that holds the smoothie cream-citrus nose beautifully in storage.

grease-monkey.genetics_lineage: Grease Monkey is a celebrated indica-dominant hybrid from Exotic Genetix, a Washington State-based breeder known for creating high-resin cultivars with dessert-forward flavor profiles. The cross is Gorilla Glue #4 × Cookies and Cream — a purposeful pairing that combines GG4's legendary resin output and diesel-earth intensity with the sweet, vanilla-cookie creaminess of Cookies and Cream (Starfighter × Girl Scout Cookies). Exotic Genetix's goal was to build a cultivar that could produce GG4-level hash yields with a more complex, dessert-candy flavor profile, and Grease Monkey delivers precisely that — dense, resin-packed buds that wash abundantly in ice water while expressing a vanilla-gas-earth terpene character that's deeply appealing. This strain has earned a dedicated following among hash makers and craft growers for its reliability, yield, and flavor.
grease-monkey.terpene_profile: Grease Monkey is anchored by caryophyllene and myrcene — caryophyllene driving a spicy, fuel-and-earth depth that's classic GG4 DNA, and myrcene contributing a tropical-fruit creaminess from the Cookies and Cream side. Limonene adds a subtle citrus brightness that lifts the otherwise heavy, earthy profile, while linalool and bisabolol bring a vanilla-floral softness that accounts for the distinctly dessert-like sweetness beneath the diesel. The aroma is uniquely layered: diesel and earth on the approach, vanilla and sweet dough in the middle, and a creamy fruit finish that sets it apart from pure GG4 descendants. In concentrate form, the caryophyllene-myrcene combination creates a rich, complex aroma that leans toward spiced vanilla with fuel undertones.
grease-monkey.effects: Grease Monkey is a powerfully sedating, indica-dominant cultivar that delivers a euphoric onset before rapidly transitioning into a heavy, full-body relaxation that defines evening and nighttime use. The GG4 heritage drives the ceiling on the effect — heavy, couch-lock adjacent, deeply physical — while the Cookies and Cream genetics soften the experience with a cerebral warmth and appetite stimulation. THC typically runs mid-to-high 20s with terpene-synergy amplifying the physical sedation. Best suited for pain management, insomnia, stress relief, and appetite stimulation; duration is 3-4 hours with a long, gradual come-down. Not a daytime strain for most consumers.
grease-monkey.flavor_aroma: The aroma hits in waves: first diesel and earth from the GG4 backbone, then a sweet vanilla cookie cream that mellows the intensity into something approachable and dessert-like. On inhale the flavor leads with sweet cookie cream; mid-palate the diesel and earth emerge; exhale brings a complex, lingering vanilla-fuel finish that coats the throat. At harvest the flowers are intensely pungent — diesel-fuel with sweet baking notes underneath; a 4-6 week cure mellows the diesel slightly and elevates the cookie-cream sweetness into a more balanced, complex profile. The smoke is rich, smooth, and satisfying.
grease-monkey.grow_notes: Grease Monkey grows with moderate height and strong structural vigor — good lateral branching, tight node spacing, and a resin development profile that begins early and continues stacking through harvest. It appreciates topping once and LST or ScrOG training to maximize the canopy and expose multiple cola sites to direct light. Flowering time is 8-9 weeks with GG4-level resin maturation peaking in the final two weeks; trichomes stack densely from week 5 onward. The plant is resilient and relatively forgiving with feeding — moderate-to-heavy in mid-flower, tapering in the final two weeks. VPD of 1.2-1.4 kPa in mid-flower; drop humidity to 45-50% in the final stretch to protect the dense, resin-heavy colas from moisture issues.
grease-monkey.rosin_extraction: Grease Monkey is a top-tier solventless performer, combining GG4's legendary resin production with the terpene complexity of Cookies and Cream to create a strain that yields abundantly and smells exceptional in extract form. Fresh frozen IWHE returns typically run 4-6% from quality material, with clean, full-melt heads washing efficiently at 34-37°F across 73-90 micron bags. Press at 165-175°F for a deep amber live rosin with the full vanilla-diesel terpene profile intact; slightly elevated temperatures work well with the high-myrcene, caryophyllene-forward profile. Cold cure at 45-50°F for 5-7 days produces a rich, dark budder that holds the complex diesel-vanilla aroma and delivers an intense, physically sedating dab experience.

blue-nerdz.genetics_lineage: Blue Nerdz is a verified cut sourced by Pig Tail Gardens from Sherb Money and the Runtz Crew — the cross is Blue Sherb × Zkittlez, where Blue Sherb itself is Blue Cookies × Sunset Sherbet. This is not a Runtz-family cross in the traditional sense; it stacks two candy-forward Zkittlez-adjacent lines against each other to maximize the blue/purple terpene and color expression. Sherb Money (a key Runtz Crew collaborator) developed this as a distinct departure from standard Runtz phenotypes, using the Sherb and Z lineage instead to push extreme candy and fruit depth. PTG describes this as a proprietary Runtz Crew strain with a very loud cherry-candy terpene profile and beautiful bag appeal — a different genetic direction than most of what circulates under the Runtz banner.
blue-nerdz.terpene_profile: Blue Nerdz expresses a Runtz-family terpene profile with an amplified candy-fruit intensity — limonene and caryophyllene lead, with the limonene expressing as tart, nerds-candy citrus sweetness and the caryophyllene adding a gas-spice backbone that keeps the profile from being purely confectionery. Myrcene contributes mango and berry depth, while linalool and ocimene add floral and herbal sweetness that gives the overall aroma a complexity beyond simple candy. The blue/purple pigmentation is driven by anthocyanin expression enhanced by cooler late-flower temperatures, but the terpene profile remains consistent regardless of color intensity. In concentrate form, the nerds-candy citrus expression concentrates into a bright, intensely sweet aroma that's among the most distinctive in the Runtz family.
blue-nerdz.effects: Blue Nerdz delivers the well-balanced euphoria the Runtz family is known for — a fast-acting, intensely uplifting onset with strong mood elevation and social energy, transitioning into a comfortable, relaxed body state that sustains the high without forcing sedation. The candy terpene profile contributes to an effect that feels bright and indulgent, suitable for creative activities, social sessions, or simply enjoying the flavor. THC runs in the high 20s; duration is 2-3 hours. The deep purple phenotype from Sherb Money's selection tends toward slightly more indica-leaning effects than lighter Runtz phenos, delivering a more well-rounded balance between cerebral lift and physical comfort.
blue-nerdz.flavor_aroma: The aroma from the jar is immediate and intense — grape, blueberry, and citrus candy with a gas backbone that announces its Runtz-crew lineage unmistakably. On inhale the flavor is pure nerds candy: tart citrus and berry sweetness with a soft creaminess underneath; exhale brings the gas and a lingering sweet fruit aftertaste. At harvest the flowers smell of blue/purple fruit candy and sweet gas — room-filling and pungent. A proper 4-6 week cure deepens the berry-grape notes and elevates the candy complexity into a rich, layered aroma that translates directly into exceptional live rosin.
blue-nerdz.grow_notes: Blue Nerdz expresses the classic Runtz growth structure — compact to medium height, tight node spacing, and dense bud formation that packs weight into a small footprint. PTG recommends cooler late-flower temperatures (60-64°F nights in weeks 6-8) to maximize the blue/purple anthocyanin expression, which deepens the visual appeal without affecting terpene quality. Responds well to topping and LST; the dense structure benefits from light defoliation in mid-flower to open the canopy and improve airflow. Flowering time is 8-9 weeks; VPD management in late flower is critical given the bud density — keep below 1.3 kPa and maintain 45-50% RH to prevent botrytis. A reliable, visually spectacular performer.
blue-nerdz.rosin_extraction: Blue Nerdz is a strong hash and rosin cultivar — the Runtz Crew genetics produce dense, quality trichome heads that wash well in ice water at 34-37°F across 73-90 micron bags, with yields typically running 3-5% from quality fresh frozen material. The candy terpene profile translates beautifully into live rosin — press at 155-165°F for a terpy, candy-forward extract that runs golden to amber and holds the full blue-nerdz candy nose in concentrated form. Lower press temperatures are recommended to preserve the volatile limonene and linalool fractions that define the candy expression. Cold cure for 5-7 days at 45°F for a soft budder with outstanding aromatic shelf life — PTG's hash customers consistently rate this as one of the most flavorful presses in the library.

jet-fuel-og.genetics_lineage: Jet Fuel OG (also known as G6) is a sativa-dominant hybrid from Colorado-based breeder 303 Seeds, created from a cross of Aspen OG and High Country Diesel — a deliberate union of West Coast OG Kush ancestry with aggressive East Coast diesel genetics. Aspen OG traces back to SFV OG crossed with Sour Cream (a direct Sour Diesel and G13 Haze descendant), while High Country Diesel draws from New York Diesel and OG Kush, bringing the classic NYC diesel fuel character into the mix. The result is a 70% sativa-dominant cultivar that delivers an OG Kush structural foundation paired with an intensely diesel, fuel-forward terpene expression that earned it recognition from High Times in 2020 as one of the year's best strains. 303 Seeds positioned this as a bridge between California OG quality and Colorado diesel intensity.
jet-fuel-og.terpene_profile: Jet Fuel OG is defined by terpinolene and caryophyllene leading an aggressive diesel-fuel terpene profile, with terpinolene contributing the piney, floral brightness that characterizes many Sour Diesel descendants and caryophyllene adding the spicy, peppery gas backbone. Myrcene contributes a musky, earthy depth underneath the fuel, while ocimene adds a sweet herbal lift that softens the intensity slightly. The overall aroma is unmistakably diesel — jet fuel, pine sap, and a subtle OG earthiness — with very little sweetness to offset the aggressive fuel character. In concentrate form, the terpinolene-caryophyllene combination creates a sharp, fuel-dominant aroma that's polarizing in the best possible way for diesel aficionados.
jet-fuel-og.effects: Jet Fuel OG lives up to its name in effect delivery — the onset is fast, energetic, and head-rushing, with a sativa-dominant cerebral lift that feels like a clean burst of mental fuel. The high is focused, motivated, and productive in moderate doses, making it one of the more functional daytime sativas in any vault. As the experience extends, the OG Kush genetics provide a grounding body relaxation that prevents anxiety without blunting the cerebral energy. Duration is 2-3 hours of sustained, productive elevation before easing into a comfortable neutral state. Best for daytime creative work, physical activity, or any situation calling for alert, energized engagement.
jet-fuel-og.flavor_aroma: The aroma is pure diesel — jet fuel, pine resin, and a sharp gas edge with a distant earthiness that recalls the classic OG Kush foundation. On inhale the flavor leads with the diesel bite: sharp, fuel-forward, and piney; mid-palate brings the earthy OG depth, and exhale delivers a long, lingering diesel finish with a slight herbal sweetness. There is minimal fruit or candy to this profile — it's an old-school, fuel-forward experience that rewards diesel lovers with an uncompromising aromatic statement. The smoke is clean and not too harsh despite the aggressive terpene profile, reflecting 303 Seeds' attention to genetic quality.
jet-fuel-og.grow_notes: Jet Fuel OG grows tall with significant stretch — up to 2-3x height increase from flip to finish — reflecting its sativa-dominant heritage, and benefits from aggressive training: topping multiple times, mainlining, or ScrOG are all recommended to manage height and maximize site count. Flowering time runs 9-10 weeks to fully express the diesel terpene complexity; harvesting early sacrifices the fuel depth that makes this strain distinctive. The plant is vigorous and resilient with a higher feeding tolerance than most OG-family genetics; it prefers well-aerated growing media, good airflow, and moderate humidity (50-55% in mid-flower). VPD of 1.3-1.6 kPa in peak flower maximizes terpene expression.
jet-fuel-og.rosin_extraction: Jet Fuel OG is a competent but not exceptional rosin performer — the sativa-dominant structure produces lower trichome density than indica-heavy hash-specific cultivars, with fresh frozen IWHE yields typically running 2-4% from quality material. The 90-120 micron bags return the best balance of yield and quality for this genetic profile. Press at 165-175°F for a darker, terpene-forward live rosin with the full diesel-pine nose expressing in concentrate form; the caryophyllene and terpinolene fractions are heat-stable and hold well through the press. The resulting rosin is potent and extremely pungent — small amounts go a long way. Best suited for experienced solventless consumers who specifically seek diesel-dominant extracts.

blue-dream.genetics_lineage: Blue Dream is a legendary West Coast hybrid originating in Santa Cruz, California — a cross of DJ Short's Blueberry and Santa Cruz Haze, producing a sativa-dominant cultivar that became the defining strain of California cannabis culture in the 2000s, made famous in SoCal around 2003. Pig Tail Gardens carries an authenticated heirloom Santa Cruz cut — one of the original verified Blue Dream phenotypes that has circulated among the SoCal elite grow community, preserving the genetic integrity that made this strain famous before seed banks and large-scale cultivation diluted the gene pool. DJ Short's Blueberry contributes the iconic blueberry sweetness and deep indica relaxation, while Santa Cruz Haze provides the cerebral energy, soaring terpene expression, and the distinctive uplifting high that made Blue Dream so universally beloved. PTG describes it as a classic workhorse of the SoCal scene, and this heirloom cut represents the strain as it was meant to be experienced.
blue-dream.terpene_profile: The heirloom Blue Dream expresses a classic terpene profile dominated by myrcene and caryophyllene, with myrcene driving the signature blueberry-mango sweetness and caryophyllene adding the herbal, slightly spicy backbone that complements the fruit without overpowering it. Pinene is prominent in this cut, contributing the fresh pine and herbal lift characteristic of true Haze genetics — a clear marker of authentic Blue Dream versus modern seed-bank expressions. Secondary terpenes include terpinolene and linalool, adding a floral sweetness and herbal complexity that make the aroma multi-dimensional. In concentrate form, the myrcene-pinene combination creates a classic blueberry-pine aroma that's immediately recognizable and deeply nostalgic for West Coast cannabis culture.
blue-dream.effects: Blue Dream's effects are the reason it became the most consumed strain in California for years — a perfectly balanced sativa-dominant hybrid that delivers cerebral euphoria and creative energy without anxiety, paired with a gentle full-body relaxation that makes it approachable at virtually any experience level. The onset is smooth and uplifting, building gradually into a sustained, clear-headed high that's functional, social, and creative for 2-3 hours. The heirloom Santa Cruz cut tends to express the Haze sativa character more clearly than commercial seed-bank versions, leaning slightly more cerebral and energetic. Universally well-tolerated and appropriate for daytime use, creative work, social settings, or outdoor activities.
blue-dream.flavor_aroma: The heirloom Santa Cruz Blue Dream is aromatherapy in flower form — fresh blueberries and sweet sugar on the nose with a Haze herbal-pine complexity underneath that provides depth and dimension. On inhale the blueberry sweetness coats the palate immediately; mid-palate brings the herbal-pine Haze character, and the exhale is smooth, slightly sweet, and long-lasting. The smoke is exceptionally smooth — a reflection of the quality and authenticity of the heirloom cut. At harvest the aroma is blueberry jam and pine resin; cured properly for 4-6 weeks the sweetness intensifies and the Haze herbal character deepens into a rich, layered complexity that exemplifies why this strain endures.
blue-dream.grow_notes: The heirloom Santa Cruz Blue Dream is a vigorous, tall-growing cultivar with significant sativa stretch — expect 2-3x height increase from flip, requiring early topping (twice is recommended) and either mainlining or ScrOG training to manage height and maximize yield. Flowering time is 9-10 weeks — Haze genetics require patience; rushing the harvest loses the full aromatic complexity that defines the authentic experience. The plant is extremely resilient and forgiving, tolerating a range of feeding levels and environmental conditions, which contributed to its widespread adoption. Moderate feeding is recommended, with a slight push in mid-flower; prefers well-aerated media and VPD around 1.2-1.4 kPa through the bulk of flower.
blue-dream.rosin_extraction: Blue Dream from the heirloom Santa Cruz cut performs moderately in solventless extraction — the sativa-leaning genetics produce less trichome density than indica-dominant hash varieties, with fresh frozen IWHE yields typically running 2-3.5% from quality material. The 90-120 micron bags return the best quality from this genetic profile, washing gently at 34-37°F for 2-3 short agitation passes. Press at 160-175°F for a light amber to golden live rosin that expresses the blueberry-pine terpene character beautifully; the myrcene and pinene fractions hold well through the press. The rosin from authentic Blue Dream is historically significant and genuinely delicious — a nostalgic, flavorful extract that captures West Coast cannabis heritage in concentrated form.

pre-98-bubba-kush.genetics_lineage: Pre-98 Bubba Kush is one of the most storied heirloom phenotypes in North American cannabis history — an authentic pre-1998 Bubba Kush cut that has been preserved in the SoCal grow community for nearly three decades, predating the explosion of commercial seed production that followed. The exact genetic origins of Pre-98 Bubba remain intentionally obscured by its originators, but it is widely attributed to a cross within the broader Afghan Kush and Hindu Kush lineage, possibly with OG Kush influence, stabilized through selection in Southern California before 1998. What is certain is its phenotypic consistency: short, squat, and incredibly dense, with an unmistakable hash-plant character that has made it a benchmark for traditional indica quality. This cut circulates among legacy SoCal growers as a preserved piece of cannabis heritage — an authentic specimen from before modern breeding transformed the landscape.
pre-98-bubba-kush.terpene_profile: Pre-98 Bubba Kush expresses a classic indica-hash terpene profile dominated by myrcene and caryophyllene, with myrcene driving the earthy, musky, tropical-fruit depth characteristic of Kush genetics and caryophyllene adding the characteristic spicy-pepper backbone. Linalool is notably prominent, contributing the distinctive floral-lavender sweetness that separates Bubba Kush from other Kush phenotypes and gives the smoke a smooth, almost sedative aromatic quality. Secondary terpenes include humulene and bisabolol, adding herbal and floral complexity. The overall aroma is classic Kush — earth, coffee, spice, and a faint tropical sweetness — with the Pre-98 cut known for expressing a cleaner, more aromatic version of the profile than later stabilized Bubba lines.
pre-98-bubba-kush.effects: Pre-98 Bubba Kush is a deeply sedating, pure indica experience — the standard by which many collectors measure other heavy indicas. The onset builds slowly with a warm, heavy euphoria that settles into the body within 30 minutes, delivering full-body muscle relaxation, appetite stimulation, and progressive sedation that makes this one of the most effective sleep and pain management strains in the heirloom catalog. The high is profound and physical rather than cerebral — experienced consumers will feel the weight of this cultivar in every muscle. Evening and nighttime use only; duration extends to 3-5 hours with a gradual, heavy come-down. As hash or rosin, the effects amplify significantly — small amounts deliver intense, medicinal-grade sedation.
pre-98-bubba-kush.flavor_aroma: Pre-98 Bubba Kush smells like a time capsule — earth, coffee, and dark spice with a faint sweet undertone that's deeply familiar to anyone who experienced the pre-commercial California cannabis scene. On inhale the flavor is rich and earthy: coffee, chocolate, and Kush spice with a smooth, almost creamy quality from the linalool; exhale delivers a dark, earthy finish that lingers for minutes. The smoke is thick and satisfying — old-school in the best possible sense. A proper 6-8 week cure elevates the coffee-earth complexity and brings out a subtle floral sweetness that hints at the linalool content. In hash form the earthy-spice character concentrates into something deeply aromatic and classically Kush.
pre-98-bubba-kush.grow_notes: Pre-98 Bubba Kush is the opposite of a stretchy sativa — it grows short, squat, and extremely bushy with minimal height increase through flower, making it ideal for low-ceiling spaces and situations where height management is critical. The dense, compact bud sites need excellent airflow management to prevent moisture-related issues; defoliation of the lower canopy is important, and late-flower humidity must be kept below 48% RH. Flowering time is 8-9 weeks with a forgiving harvest window — this is a stable, consistent performer that rewards patient, attentive cultivation. Moderate feeding; avoid over-watering given the dense root structure. VPD around 1.0-1.3 kPa in mid-flower, dropping slightly in the final stretch.
pre-98-bubba-kush.rosin_extraction: Pre-98 Bubba Kush is an exceptional hash plant — the Kush lineage and hash-plant structure produce dense, resinous trichomes that are purpose-built for traditional and modern solventless extraction. Fresh frozen IWHE yields run 4-6% from quality material, with large, well-formed heads washing cleanly at 33-36°F across 73-90 micron bags. Press at 165-175°F for a dark, rich live rosin that leans amber-brown and expresses the full earthy-spice-coffee nose in concentrated form; slightly higher temperatures work well with the myrcene-caryophyllene-linalool terpene structure. The resulting hash rosin is deeply aromatic, potent, and medicinal — traditional, full-spectrum hash energy in modern rosin form. Cold cure for 7-10 days at 45°F for a rich, dark budder that holds and deepens the classic Kush aromatics.

skywalker-og.genetics_lineage: The Skywalker OG at Pig Tail Gardens is not the Dutch Passion Skywalker × OG Kush hybrid that most databases list under this name — it is a true OG Kush clone with genetics of Emerald Triangle × Nevil's Hindu Kush, the original accidental 1991 cross that produced OG Kush when Nevil Schoenmakers' Hindu Kush pollinated an Emerald Triangle plant in a South Florida garden. The strain was renamed 'Skywalker OG' by the Sunset Collective dispensary in West Hollywood, where it was originally sold as 'Sativa OG Kush.' PTG received this cut from a mentor who worked at Sunset Collective and has personally held the cut for over 15 years — a direct, unbroken provenance chain back to one of the most significant genetic preservation stories in West Coast cannabis history. This is a true OG Kush expression in every sense, and its Hollywood heritage gives it arguably the most documented provenance of any cut in PTG's library.
skywalker-og.terpene_profile: Skywalker OG expresses the classic OG Kush terpene trifecta: limonene, myrcene, and caryophyllene leading a lemon-fuel-earth profile that's immediately recognizable as OG-family genetics. The limonene drives a bright lemon and citrus-pine top note, myrcene contributes the earthy, tropical depth, and caryophyllene adds the spicy, gassy backbone. Linalool and bisabolol are secondary but notable, contributing a floral sweetness and smooth quality that distinguish Skywalker OG from heavier fuel-dominant OG expressions. In concentrate form, the limonene-myrcene combination creates a classic lemon-pine-gas live rosin aroma that is quintessential West Coast OG heritage.
skywalker-og.effects: Skywalker OG delivers a powerful, indica-dominant high with an OG Kush cerebral onset — the lemon-fuel terpenes hit first with an uplifting, euphoric mood shift before the Skywalker indica genetics settle in with a heavy, full-body relaxation. This is a potent, evening-use cultivar: THC typically in the mid-to-high 20s with a deep, long-lasting physical effect that provides genuine relief for stress, pain, and insomnia. The OG Kush cerebral component keeps it from being purely sedative at onset — there's a window of functional euphoria before the indica body effect takes full hold. Duration is 3-4 hours with a gradual transition into deep relaxation and sleep. A benchmark West Coast indica-dominant experience.
skywalker-og.flavor_aroma: The aroma is classic OG — lemon Pledge, pine sol, and diesel fuel with an earthy sweetness underneath that's unmistakably Hollywood. On inhale the lemon-pine-OG flavor is immediate and satisfying; mid-palate brings the earthy diesel depth, and exhale delivers a long OG finish that coats the throat with the signature lemon-gas aftertaste. The heirloom Hollywood cut expresses the OG terpene profile at full intensity — pungent, fuel-forward, and room-filling at harvest. A proper 6-8 week cure sharpens the lemon and pine notes and mellows the raw diesel edge into a more refined, complex OG expression that's exceptional both smoked and pressed.
skywalker-og.grow_notes: Skywalker OG is a moderate-to-heavy feeder with a medium height and good OG structure — dense nodal spacing, strong lateral branching, and compact, resinous buds that stack weight with excellent trichome coverage. It responds well to topping once or twice early and a ScrOG or LST setup to manage the canopy; the OG genetics appreciate good light penetration to the lower bud sites. Flowering time runs 9-10 weeks — OG Kush genetics need time for the full lemon-fuel terpene expression to develop; harvesting at 8 weeks loses significant aromatic complexity. Prefers a deep-watering cycle, excellent airflow, and low-to-moderate humidity in late flower (45-50% RH). VPD of 1.3-1.5 kPa through peak flower; the Hollywood cut is known for being particularly responsive to environmental dialing.
skywalker-og.rosin_extraction: Skywalker OG is a premier solventless cultivar — the OG Kush and Skywalker genetics combine to produce dense, resinous trichome coverage that translates directly into strong hash and rosin performance. Fresh frozen IWHE yields run 4-6% from quality material, with clean, full-melt heads washing efficiently at 33-37°F across 73-90 micron bags. Press at 160-170°F for a golden to amber live rosin with the full lemon-pine-OG terpene character preserved; the limonene fraction is volatile, so lower press temperatures and shorter press time protect the top notes. PTG's heirloom Hollywood cut is especially prized in the SoCal solventless community for the authenticity of its OG flavor in extract form — a classic West Coast hash heritage experience.

kush-mintz.genetics_lineage: Kush Mintz is a SoCal classic from Seed Junky Genetics, a cross of Bubba Kush x Animal Mints — specifically the Rabid Hippie cut, one of the most sought-after phenotypes of Kush Mints in the Los Angeles cannabis community. Pig Tail Gardens carries this verified Rabid Hippie cut as part of their heirloom and legacy genetics library, acknowledging it as a cornerstone of West Coast elite genetics. Seed Junky Genetics (JBeezy) developed Kush Mints by taking Bubba Kush pollen to their clone-only Animal Mints strain, resulting in a hybrid that stacks the classic Bubba indica depth, coffee-earth character, and hash-plant structure against the sharp, minty-cookie sweetness and resin intensity of Animal Mints (Animal Cookies x SinMint Cookies). The Rabid Hippie pheno is specifically recognized for exceptional terpene expression, minty complexity, and outstanding rosin yield — exactly the profile PTG selects for in their library.
kush-mintz.terpene_profile: Kush Mintz leads with caryophyllene and limonene, expressing a sharp mint-cookie aroma backed by a spicy-gassy depth that reflects both the Animal Mints and Bubba Kush heritage. The mint note is distinctive and clean — cool, herbal, and slightly sweet — layered over the earthy-coffee Kush base to create a complex, multi-dimensional aroma that's unlike most cookie-family genetics. Linalool contributes a floral creaminess that softens the sharp mint-gas into something almost dessert-like in its overall impression. Secondary terpenes include myrcene and bisabolol, adding fruit depth and smooth, floral complexity. In concentrate form the mint-gas-cookie combination expresses with remarkable clarity — Kush Mintz rosin is consistently described as the most distinctively aromatic in any hash collection.
kush-mintz.effects: Kush Mintz delivers a potent, well-balanced high that reflects both parent strains — Bubba Kush's deep, physical sedation underlies a cerebral onset from the Animal Mints side that's euphoric, mood-lifting, and functional in the early stages. The high builds over 30-45 minutes from an uplifting, relaxed clarity into a heavy, full-body relaxation that's best suited for evening use, stress relief, and pain management. THC typically runs high 20s, with the terpene synergy (particularly caryophyllene and linalool) amplifying the physical and sedative character. The Rabid Hippie pheno is noted for a particularly smooth, clean effect profile — no ceiling-hit anxiety, just a steady, comfortable descent into relaxation. Duration is 2-3.5 hours.
kush-mintz.flavor_aroma: The aroma of the Rabid Hippie Kush Mintz cut is immediately captivating — cool mint and cookie sweetness with a Kush earth and coffee foundation that makes it smell like mint chocolate coffee cake. On inhale the mint hits first: clean, cool, and sweet; mid-palate brings the cookie-earth depth; and exhale delivers a long, complex finish of spice, gas, and cool mint that lingers significantly. At harvest the flowers fill the room with mint-cookie-gas — one of the most unmistakable aromas in the SoCal elite genetics canon. A proper 6-8 week cure deepens the coffee-earth Kush base and elevates the mint-cookie complexity into a rich, layered profile that is exceptional in both smoke and extract form.
kush-mintz.grow_notes: Kush Mintz grows with moderate height and strong, dense structure typical of Seed Junky's Bubba Kush-influenced lines — compact, tight-nodded, and producing heavy, resin-coated buds that stack mass efficiently with proper support. It responds excellently to topping once or twice and ScrOG or LST training to open the canopy and maximize site count; the Bubba Kush structure can create a dense lower canopy that benefits from defoliation in mid-flower. Flowering time runs 8-9 weeks for the Rabid Hippie cut; the mint terpenes peak in the final two weeks and continue building right to harvest, so monitoring trichomes closely for peak collection timing is recommended. VPD around 1.2-1.4 kPa; keep late-flower humidity below 48% to protect the dense Bubba-influenced bud structure.
kush-mintz.rosin_extraction: Kush Mintz is one of the premier solventless cultivars in the West Coast hash canon — the Bubba Kush x Animal Mints genetics produce exceptional trichome density and head quality that translates into outstanding ice water hash and rosin performance. The Rabid Hippie cut specifically is prized in the SoCal solventless community for its wash yield and flavor integrity. Fresh frozen IWHE returns typically run 4-6% from quality material, with large, intact heads washing cleanly at 33-36°F across 73-90 micron bags. Press at 155-165°F for 90 seconds on fresh frozen for a mint-cookie live rosin that runs pale amber-gold and expresses the full Rabid Hippie terpene profile with remarkable clarity. Cold cure at 45-50°F for 5-7 days produces a premium soft budder that holds the mint-gas-cookie aroma beautifully over time.
